plan.summary: Rebuild week after a very low-TSS dip — athlete is fresh (TSB +11), HRV healthy, so progressively reload volume targeting ~370–400 TSS with one threshold quality session mid-week to arrest CTL slide and resume upward trend.

workout.label: Full Rest / Mobility
workout.description: Complete rest day. Optional 20 min light stretching or foam rolling — no structured training. Let the freshness accumulate heading into a full week.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats cooked in oat milk, 1 banana sliced, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tsp chia seeds, pinch cinnamon
nutrition.lunch: Lentil grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 120g cooked green lentils, roasted zucchini and bell pepper, 1 tbsp tahini-lemon dressing
nutrition.dinner: Tofu stir-fry: 200g firm tofu cubed and pan-seared, bok choy, snap peas, garlic, ginger, soy-sesame sauce, served over 150g cooked rice noodles

workout.label: Easy Aerobic Swim
workout.description: Z2 easy. 200m warm-up, 4x200m steady at comfortable pace with 20s rest between, 100m cool-down. Total ~1100m. Focus on long stroke, relaxed breathing — no pushing effort.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g rolled oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tsp chia seeds
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 120g canned chickpeas (rinsed), cucumber, cherry tomatoes, red onion, 1 tbsp tahini dressing, fresh parsley
nutrition.dinner: Baked salmon fillet (150g), roasted sweet potato wedges (200g), steamed broccoli with olive oil and lemon
nutrition.snacks: Rice cake + 1 tbsp peanut butter, small handful mixed nuts

workout.label: Z2 Aerobic Ride
workout.description: Z2 easy ride, HR 130–145. Flat to rolling terrain. Cadence 85–95 rpm. Keep it conversational — this is volume, not intensity. Good opportunity to settle back into consistent training rhythm.

nutrition.breakfast: 2 scrambled eggs + 1 slice whole grain toast, 1/2 avocado, side of sliced orange
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g cooked brown rice, 120g black beans, roasted sweet potato cubes, shredded red cabbage, lime-cumin dressing
nutrition.dinner: Red lentil dal: 150g red lentils simmered with canned tomatoes, onion, garlic, cumin, turmeric, garam masala — served over 150g basmati rice with a side of sautéed spinach
nutrition.snacks: Banana + 2 tbsp peanut butter, 1 rice cake post-ride

workout.label: Threshold Quality Run — QUALITY SESSION OF THE WEEK
workout.description: 10 min Z2 warm-up jog. Main set: 3x8 min at Z3–Z4 threshold effort (HR 158–168, comfortably hard but sustainable), 3 min easy jog recovery between reps. 7 min Z2 cool-down. Total ~50 min. HRV is solid at 86ms avg and TSB is positive — athlete is ready for quality today.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g oats, banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, 1 tsp chia seeds, drizzle honey
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g brown rice, 120g green lentils, roasted carrots and beets, 1 hard-boiled egg, tahini-lemon dressing
nutrition.dinner: Tempeh and veggie sheet pan: 180g tempeh cubed, broccoli, red onion, bell pepper, roasted at 400°F with tamari-maple glaze, served with 150g cooked farro
nutrition.snacks: Small banana pre-run, Greek yogurt (150g) + berries post-run

workout.label: Strength & Mobility
workout.description: Triathlon-specific strength circuit. 2 rounds: goblet squat x12, single-leg deadlift x10 each, glute bridge x15, push-up x12, band pull-apart x15, dead bug x10 each side. Finish with 10 min hip flexor and thoracic mobility work. Keep effort low — this is recovery-compatible strength.

nutrition.breakfast: 2 scrambled eggs, 1 slice whole grain toast, sliced tomato, 1/2 avocado
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g brown rice, 120g canned chickpeas, cucumber, sun-dried tomatoes, kalamata olives, lemon-herb dressing
nutrition.dinner: Pasta e fagioli: whole wheat penne 100g dry, white cannellini beans, canned tomatoes, garlic, rosemary, parmesan shaving, olive oil drizzle
nutrition.snacks: Apple + 20g almonds, rice cake with nut butter

workout.label: Easy Z2 Run
workout.description: Z2 easy run, HR <145. Conversational pace throughout. No surges. Focus on form — cadence ~170–175 spm, relaxed shoulders, midfoot strike. Good active recovery after yesterday's strength and Wednesday's quality session.

nutrition.breakfast: Oat bowl: 80g oats, 1 banana, 1 tbsp almond butter, chia seeds
nutrition.lunch: Grain bowl: 150g brown rice, 120g edamame, shredded carrots, avocado slices, sesame-ginger dressing, toasted sesame seeds
nutrition.dinner: Baked white fish (tilapia or cod, 150g) with herb crust, roasted asparagus and cherry tomatoes, 150g boiled baby potatoes with olive oil and dill
nutrition.snacks: Orange + small handful mixed nuts, Greek yogurt 100g

workout.label: Longer Z2 Aerobic Ride
workout.description: Z2 long ride, HR 130–145 throughout. The week's anchor workout — keeps volume honest and drives CTL. Flat to mildly rolling route. Eat ~200 kcal/hr on the bike (banana, rice cake). No surges, no chasing — pure aerobic base work.

nutrition.breakfast: 2 eggs scrambled + 2 slices whole grain toast, 1/2 avocado, banana pre-ride
nutrition.lunch: Post-ride recovery bowl: 180g cooked farro, 150g canned black beans, roasted butternut squash, salsa, lime, 1 tbsp Greek yogurt as sour cream substitute
nutrition.dinner: Chicken thigh (150g, baked with garlic and herbs — the week's one meat meal), roasted sweet potato mash, green beans sautéed with olive oil and garlic
nutrition.snacks: Rice cake + peanut butter on the bike, smoothie post-ride: oat milk + banana + 1 scoop protein + frozen berries

weekly_totals.note: TSS is intentionally moderate (~345) for this first rebuild week — athlete's TSS crashed to 65 last week from 227 prior, so a sharp jump risks overreach. This week reloads volume steadily, arrests CTL decline, and positions Week 2 to push toward 380–410 TSS for a clean CTL uptick.

Protein: canned white cannellini beans x1 can
white fish fillets (tilapia or cod) x1 (150g portion)

conversation.content:
Plan the week of Jun 22 – Jun 28.

Current fitness data:
- CTL (fitness): 29.1
- ATL (fatigue): 18.1
- TSB (form): 11.0 (positive = fresh, negative = fatigued)
- TSS last 7 days: 65
- TSS prior 7 days: 227
- Last night HRV: 69 ms
- 7-day avg HRV: 86.0 ms
- 7-day avg resting HR: 49.3 bpm
- Oura readiness score: 83/100

Use this data to calibrate intensity and volume for the week.
